prompt: Add a user story: as a requestor I want to clone a previous request as a starting point for a new one, because most of my orders look almost identical to past ones. Acceptance criteria: clone button visible on closed requests; clone copies line items but leaves notes blank; cloned request starts in Draft status.

assertions.text: A new file us###.md was created under <sandbox>/main/docs/notes/ (the main worktree's AKM dir)
NO new us*.md was created under <sandbox>/feat/docs/notes/ (the feature worktree's tree is untouched)
Filename slug matches us<NNN>.md with three-digit zero-padded id and is us015 or higher (does not collide with seeded ids us001-us014)
The new file is staged in the main worktree's git index (git -C <sandbox>/main status --porcelain shows the file as 'A ' or 'AM ')
No commit was created on main for this story (git -C <sandbox>/main log --oneline shows only the seed commit, not a new story commit)
## role section contains [[pn001|requestor]] referencing the existing seeded persona
## acceptance_criteria has exactly 3 bullets matching the user's input
Skill confirmation surfaces the absolute AKM path so the user sees the write landed in <sandbox>/main, not <sandbox>/feat
